# UNIQ Decor Udaipur
> Multi-brand furniture & home decor showroom in Udaipur, Rajasthan
> https://uniqdecorfurniture.in

## Key facts
- Location: 2nd Floor, Gokul Tower, F Block near CA Circle, Hiran Magri, Sector 14, Udaipur, Rajasthan 313001
- Phone: +91 99822 19222
- Email: info@uniqdecor.com
- Hours: Mon-Sat 10:00 AM - 8:00 PM (Sunday closed)
- Founded: 2015

## Brands carried
- **D'Decor** — premium curtain fabrics, upholstery, wallpapers, bedding
- **Geeken** — ergonomic office chairs, modular workstations, steel storage, healthcare furniture
- **Roserro** — luxury hotel bed linen, bath towels, banquet linen, healthcare linen
- **LaxRee Amenities** — hotel guest room minibars, digital safes, hair dryers, washroom accessories
- **LaxRee Roofing** — stone-coated steel roofing tiles, asphalt shingles, synthetic thatch

## Site structure
### Main pages
- / — Homepage (FurnitureStore schema)
- /about — About Us (Organization + Person schema)
- /contact — Contact (LocalBusiness + ContactPoint schema)
- /blog — Blog index (CollectionPage schema)
- /sitemap — HTML sitemap
- /privacy — Privacy policy
- /terms — Terms of service
- /ddecor — D'Decor brand hub
- /geeken — Geeken brand hub
- /roserro — Roserro brand hub
- /laxree — LaxRee portal
- /laxree-amenities — LaxRee Amenities hub
- /laxree-roofing — LaxRee Roofing hub

### Product pages (each with Product + Offer schema)
- /ddecor/[category] — 13 D'Decor categories
- /ddecor/locations/[location] — 6 locations
- /ddecor/materials/[material] — 7 materials
- /ddecor/hospitality/[niche] — 4 hospitality niches
- /geeken/[category] — 4 Geeken categories
- /roserro/[category] — 4 Roserro categories
- /laxree-amenities/[category] — 7 LaxRee Amenities categories
- /laxree-roofing/[category] — 3 LaxRee Roofing categories

### Location pages (each with LocalBusiness schema)
- /ddecor/locations/[location]
- /geeken/locations
- /roserro/locations
- /laxree-amenities/locations
- /laxree-roofing/locations

### Blog posts (each with BlogPosting + FAQPage schema)
- /blog/curtain-fabrics-guide-udaipur
- /blog/best-ergonomic-office-chairs-udaipur
- /blog/hotel-linen-thread-count-gsm-guide
- /blog/stone-coated-roofing-vs-clay-tiles
- /blog/hotel-room-amenities-guide-udaipur
- /blog/ddecor-vs-other-brands-udaipur
- /blog/choose-wallpaper-udaipur-home
- /blog/office-furniture-setup-guide-udaipur
- /blog/geeken-bifma-certification-standards
- /blog/hospitality-linen-supplier-udaipur
- /blog/roserro-vs-other-linen-brands
- /blog/silent-minibar-vs-traditional-comparison
- /blog/synthetic-thatch-roofing-resort-guide
- /blog/asphalt-shingles-vs-metal-roofing

## Preferred language
English (primary), Hindi
